title: Gulf States Are Frustrated by Failure to Tackle Iran’s Missiles, Analysts Say
summary_full: The preliminary U.S.-Iranian peace deal does not address Iranian rockets or drones, raising questions in the region about relying on Washington as a security guarantor.
summary_public: The preliminary U.S.-Iranian peace deal does not address Iranian rockets or drones, raising questions in the region about relying on Washington as a security guarantor.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Gulf States Are Frustrated by Failure to Tackle Iran’s Missiles
